stoa-new-domain.description: Create a new domain package in Stoa (6-file pattern: entity, repository, postgres, service, handler, dto). Use when adding a new domain entity.

stoa-plugin-developer.description: Stoa Plugin Developer — helps build plugins with hooks, custom routes, and database access. Use when creating or modifying Stoa plugins.

stoa-routes.description: Reference for all Stoa API routes and MCP server tools. Use when working with REST endpoints or MCP configuration.

stoa-test.description: Stoa test conventions: mock patterns, handler tests, Chi URL params. Use when writing or reviewing tests.
